title: dasymaschalon clusiflorum var. oblongatum
intro: Dasymaschalon clusiflorum var. oblongatum is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the custard apple or soursop family. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasymaschalon clusiflorum var. oblongatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Dasymaschalon clusiflorum var. oblongatum is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and sometimes used in traditional folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
